body: Hi Jordan — I’m hiring for a six-week launch sprint and wanted to see if you’d be open to a quick intro call.
Yes, happy to chat. Send over a few options and I’ll grab one.
Great. I can do May 5 at 10:00, May 5 at 14:00, or May 6 at 11:00.
Locked in. I’ve got you down for May 5 at 10:00.
I need to reschedule that hold. Could we move it?
Absolutely. I can do May 8 at 10:00, May 8 at 14:00, or May 9 at 11:00.
Perfect. You’re moved to May 8 at 10:00.
Sorry again — one more change on my side. Can we shift that call?
No problem. Fresh options: May 9 at 10:00, May 9 at 14:00, or May 10 at 11:00.
Let’s do May 9 at 10:00 this time.
Done — May 9 at 10:00 is locked in.
